title.en: Going Fast: HT, VHT & Operating-Mode Elements
title.zh: 提速：HT、VHT 与工作模式通告元素

blocks.en: When 802.11n (HT, High Throughput) and then 802.11ac (VHT, Very High Throughput) pushed Wi-Fi past the old 54 Mb/s ceiling, they needed a way to negotiate all the new radio tricks — extra spatial streams, wider channels, short guard intervals, beamforming. That negotiation rides in a small family of information elements. This lesson is a guided tour of that family: not a field-by-field dump, but a feel for who says what, and when.
blocks.zh: 当 802.11n（HT，高吞吐量）以及随后的 802.11ac（VHT，甚高吞吐量）把 Wi-Fi 推过旧时代 54 Mb/s 的天花板时，它们需要一种方式来协商所有新的射频技巧——更多的空间流、更宽的信道、短保护间隔、波束赋形。这些协商承载在一小族信息元素里。本课就是带你逛一遍这一族：不是逐字段的罗列，而是建立起“谁在说什么、什么时候说”的直觉。

blocks.en: There's one organising idea that makes the whole family click. A Capabilities element is a station saying 'here's what my radio can do' — the menu of options it supports (spatial streams, channel widths, MCS rates, beamforming roles). An Operation element is the AP saying 'here's how this BSS is actually configured right now' — the choices the network has settled on, which every member must respect. Capabilities are about potential; Operation is about the current reality. Keep that pairing in mind and each element below tells you which half of the conversation it's in.
blocks.zh: 有一个统领性的思路能让整族元素豁然开朗。Capabilities（能力）元素是站点在说“我的射频能做什么”——它支持的选项菜单（空间流、信道宽度、MCS 速率、波束赋形角色）。Operation（工作）元素是 AP 在说“这个 BSS 现在到底是怎么配置的”——网络已经敲定的选择，每个成员都必须遵守。能力讲的是“潜力”，工作讲的是“当下的事实”。记住这对配对关系，下面每个元素你都能一眼看出它处在对话的哪一半。

blocks.en: The two capability+operation pairs are the backbone. HT Capabilities (9.4.2.54) is how a station declares 'I am an HT STA' and lists its options — LDPC, 20-vs-40 MHz support, short guard intervals, Tx/Rx STBC, A-MPDU limits, MCS set, beamforming. HT Operation (9.4.2.55) is the BSS-side counterpart: it names the primary channel, the secondary-channel offset (above/below/none), the allowed STA channel width, and the protection mode that keeps older non-HT stations safe. VHT Capabilities (9.4.2.156) does the same job one generation up — wider 80/160/80+80 MHz support, SU/MU beamformer/beamformee roles, the VHT-MCS-and-NSS set. VHT Operation (9.4.2.157) sets the BSS Channel Width and the center-frequency segments for those wide channels (and borrows the primary channel from the HT Operation element).
blocks.zh: 两对“能力+工作”是整族的脊梁。HT 能力（9.4.2.54）是站点声明“我是一个 HT 站点”并列出其选项的方式——LDPC、20 还是 40 MHz 支持、短保护间隔、收发 STBC、A-MPDU 限制、MCS 集、波束赋形。HT 工作（9.4.2.55）是 BSS 一侧的对应物：它给出主信道、次信道偏移（在上方/下方/无）、允许的站点信道宽度，以及保护较老的非 HT 站点的保护模式。VHT 能力（9.4.2.156）做同样的事，只是升了一代——更宽的 80/160/80+80 MHz 支持、SU/MU 波束赋形发起者/接收者角色、VHT-MCS-与-NSS 集。VHT 工作（9.4.2.157）设定 BSS 信道宽度以及这些宽信道的中心频率分段（而主信道则借用 HT 工作元素里的信息）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 520 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><rect x='8' y='40' width='60' height='40'/><rect x='68' y='40' width='50' height='40'/><rect x='118' y='40' width='110' height='40'/><rect x='228' y='40' width='70' height='40'/><rect x='298' y='40' width='150' height='40'/><rect x='448' y='40' width='64' height='40'/></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle'><text x='38' y='64'>Element ID</text><text x='93' y='64'>Length</text><text x='173' y='58'>HT Capability</text><text x='173' y='72'>Information</text><text x='263' y='58'>A-MPDU</text><text x='263' y='72'>Params</text><text x='373' y='58'>Supported</text><text x='373' y='72'>MCS Set</text><text x='480' y='58'>Ext Cap /</text><text x='480' y='72'>BF / ASEL</text></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10'><text x='38' y='34'>1</text><text x='93' y='34'>1</text><text x='173' y='34'>2</text><text x='263' y='34'>1</text><text x='373' y='34'>16</text><text x='480' y='34'>2+4+1</text><text x='260' y='20' font-size='11'>HT Capabilities element (octets)</text></g></svg>

caption.en: The HT Capabilities element layout — a representative member of the family. After the common Element ID + Length, the body is the capability-bit field, A-MPDU limits, the MCS set, then extended/beamforming/ASEL capability blocks.
caption.zh: HT 能力元素的布局——该族的一个代表成员。在通用的 Element ID + Length 之后，主体依次是能力位字段、A-MPDU 限制、MCS 集，然后是扩展/波束赋形/ASEL 能力块。

blocks.en: A radio's situation can change mid-session, so the family includes a live re-negotiation tool. Operating Mode Notification (9.4.2.164) lets a station tell its peer, on the fly, that it is changing its operating channel width, the maximum number of spatial streams it can receive, or its LDPC-receive preference — for example dropping from 80 MHz / 2 streams to 20 MHz / 1 stream to save power, then ramping back up. It carries a single Operating Mode field and needs no re-association.
blocks.zh: 一个射频的状态可能在会话中途变化，因此这一族里还有一件在线重新协商的工具。工作模式通告（9.4.2.164）让站点能即时告诉对端，它正在改变自己的工作信道宽度、最多可接收的空间流数，或者 LDPC 接收偏好——例如从 80 MHz / 2 流降到 20 MHz / 1 流以省电，之后再升回去。它只携带一个 Operating Mode 字段，无需重新关联。

blocks.en: The '20/40 coexistence trio' exists because 40 MHz channels are greedy — they occupy spectrum a neighbouring 20 MHz network also wants. 20/40 BSS Intolerant Channel Report (9.4.2.56) lists channels where a STA found conditions that forbid 40 MHz operation. Overlapping BSS Scan Parameters (9.4.2.57) is the AP telling members how to scan for those neighbours (dwell times, intervals, thresholds). 20/40 BSS Coexistence (9.4.2.58) carries the actual asks — a Forty MHz Intolerant bit and a 20 MHz BSS Width Request — that can force an AP to stay narrow. Together they let wide and narrow networks share a band politely.
blocks.zh: “20/40 共存三件套”之所以存在，是因为 40 MHz 信道很“贪心”——它占用的频谱，相邻的 20 MHz 网络也想要。20/40 BSS 不容忍信道报告（9.4.2.56）列出某站点发现禁止使用 40 MHz 的条件所在的信道。重叠 BSS 扫描参数（9.4.2.57）是 AP 告诉成员如何扫描这些邻居（驻留时间、间隔、门限）。20/40 BSS 共存（9.4.2.58）承载真正的诉求——一个 Forty MHz Intolerant 位和一个 20 MHz BSS Width Request——它们能迫使 AP 保持窄带。三者合力，让宽窄网络在同一频段里礼貌共处。

blocks.en: Two smaller members round out the survey. The AID element (9.4.2.162) simply carries the Association Identifier the AP handed the station during association — a short numeric handle the BSS uses to address that station (think coat-check ticket). The Quiet Channel element (9.4.2.163) is VHT-specific: it tells stations that the secondary 80 MHz channel of a VHT BSS should fall silent during a quiet interval, and (via its AP Quiet Mode field) whether the primary 80 MHz channel may still be used — useful for radar detection and coexistence on wide channels.
blocks.zh: 另有两个较小的成员让这次巡览更完整。AID 元素（9.4.2.162）只是承载 AP 在关联时分配给站点的关联标识符（Association Identifier）——BSS 用来寻址该站点的一个简短数字句柄（可以想成寄存衣物的号牌）。静默信道元素（9.4.2.163）则是 VHT 专用：它告诉站点，VHT BSS 的次 80 MHz 信道应在静默间隔内保持安静，并（通过其 AP Quiet Mode 字段）说明主 80 MHz 信道是否仍可使用——这对宽信道上的雷达检测与共存很有用。

summary.en: How the secondary channel and BSS width are actually signalled
summary.zh: 次信道与 BSS 宽度究竟是如何被通告的

blocks.en: The secondary-channel and width story spans both Operation elements. In HT Operation (9.4.2.55, Table 9-230), the Secondary Channel Offset subfield is encoded SCN=0 (no secondary channel), SCA=1 (secondary above the primary), SCB=3 (secondary below); value 2 is reserved. The STA Channel Width subfield is 0 for a fixed 20 MHz, or 1 to allow any width in the supported set — so 40 MHz HT operation needs STA Channel Width = 1 AND a non-zero Secondary Channel Offset. For VHT, the primary channel is NOT repeated: VHT Operation (9.4.2.157, Table 9-316) says the VHT STA gets primary-channel information from the HT Operation element, and adds a Channel Width subfield (0 = 20/40 MHz, 1 = 80/160/80+80 MHz; values 2 and 3 deprecated) plus two Channel Center Frequency Segment fields whose meaning (160 vs 80+80) is resolved by Table 9-317 from how far apart the two segments are. So full BSS bandwidth is a joint read of the HT Operation STA Channel Width and the VHT Operation Channel Width fields together.
blocks.zh: 次信道与宽度的故事横跨两个工作元素。在 HT 工作（9.4.2.55，表 9-230）中，Secondary Channel Offset 子字段的编码为：SCN=0（无次信道）、SCA=1（次信道在主信道之上）、SCB=3（次信道在主信道之下）；值 2 保留。STA Channel Width 子字段为 0 表示固定 20 MHz，为 1 表示允许使用支持集中的任意宽度——所以 40 MHz 的 HT 工作既需要 STA Channel Width = 1，也需要一个非零的 Secondary Channel Offset。对于 VHT，主信道并不重复：VHT 工作（9.4.2.157，表 9-316）规定 VHT 站点从 HT 工作元素获取主信道信息，并新增一个 Channel Width 子字段（0 = 20/40 MHz，1 = 80/160/80+80 MHz；值 2 与 3 已弃用），外加两个 Channel Center Frequency Segment 字段，其含义（究竟是 160 还是 80+80）由表 9-317 根据两个分段相隔多远来判定。因此完整的 BSS 带宽要把 HT 工作的 STA Channel Width 与 VHT 工作的 Channel Width 字段联合起来读才能确定。

cites.note: 9.4.2.54 HT Capabilities (element structure, capability-info bits, A-MPDU, MCS set); 9.4.2.55 HT Operation (primary channel, secondary channel offset, STA channel width, protection)
9.4.2.56 20/40 BSS Intolerant Channel Report; 9.4.2.57 Overlapping BSS Scan Parameters; 9.4.2.58 20/40 BSS Coexistence (Forty MHz Intolerant, 20 MHz BSS Width Request)
9.4.2.156 VHT Capabilities (element + capability-info); 9.4.2.157 VHT Operation (Channel Width, center-frequency segments; primary channel from HT Operation)
9.4.2.162 AID element; 9.4.2.163 Quiet Channel element; 9.4.2.164 Operating Mode Notification element (Operating Mode field)
